changelog: Removed TensorFlow/DeepFace dependency - emotion detection now uses MediaPipe face mesh landmarks (zero additional cost, no DLL issues)
Fixed start.bat immediately closing on Windows
Fixed update.bat network error when no releases exist
Replaced complex BAT inline Python with check_update.py helper
All BAT files now stay open on error for troubleshooting
Fixed mediapipe AttributeError in PyInstaller EXE builds
Pinned dependency versions to prevent compatibility issues
Added PyInstaller hook for mediapipe with collect_all
Added auto-update dependency check on start (version.json vs install_info.json)
Added YOLO_AUTOINSTALL=0 to prevent ultralytics auto-updating
Fixed camera look event counting - now counts distinct events (transitions)
Added separate x/y gaze thresholds for more accurate camera look detection
Improved walking detection using hip displacement instead of ankle positions
Added professional installer (install.bat) and updater system
Optimized frame processing with single RGB conversion
Added camera look visual indicator on annotated video
Head pose angle normalization to prevent gimbal lock issues
Emotion detector handles edge cases with zero-dimension crops
